vulnerabilities.description: JWT secret key validation occurs at config time but runtime token parsing may use insecure signing method validation. The code checks signing method but the full implementation is not visible.
vulnerabilities.fix: Ensure ValidateToken explicitly rejects 'none' algorithm and uses constant-time comparison for signature verification

vulnerabilities.description: OTLP gRPC exporter does not explicitly show TLS configuration. Insecure connections could expose telemetry data.
vulnerabilities.fix: Add explicit TLS configuration with otlptracegrpc.WithTLSCredentials and fallback to insecure only with explicit environment variable

vulnerabilities.description: SAML signature validation code is partially shown. Need to ensure signature verification prevents XML wrapping attacks.
vulnerabilities.fix: Implement XML canonicalization before signature validation and enforce strict schema validation

vulnerabilities.description: Cookie domain attribute not shown in security options. Missing explicit domain could lead to subcookie leakage.
vulnerabilities.fix: Add explicit Domain field to CookieSecurity and document subdomain implications

owasp_checks.detail: JWT claims include user_id, org_id, role for authorization. Audience validation mentioned.
Argon2id for passwords (OWASP recommended). SHA-1 removed from SAML. Min 32-byte JWT secrets.
No SQL injection patterns in reviewed code. Uses parameterized queries expected.
Defense in depth: JWT + cookies + SAML + OIDC. Rate limiting not shown in snippets.
AutoCookieSecurity for environment-aware settings. Secure defaults enforced.
15-minute access tokens. 48-hour max refresh. Argon2id with proper parameters.

owasp_checks.category: A08:2021 - Software and Data Integrity Failures
owasp_checks.detail: SAML signature validation enforced. SHA-1 rejected.
Not applicable in reviewed auth middleware code.
